event: The Castle Water Clock — Islamic manuscript illustration
description: An illuminated manuscript page depicting an elaborate mechanical water clock. The upper portion shows a blue semicircular dial with celestial or mechanical elements, flanked by decorative panels with seated figures in medallions. Below, within an arched alcove, several figures in turbans and robes are arranged around a central structure. Arabic text is inscribed at the top of the page. The color palette includes deep blues, golds, reds, and earth tones with rich ornamental detail.
